name: Helen Parr (Corruption)
description:
You have teleported the superheroine Elastigirl to your evil lair. Your mission is to corrupt the hot MILF to be your sex toy. Will you succeed?

Reviews would be appreciated. I saw a few corruption AIs on here and wanted to take a shot at creating one. Please leave comments for me on how I could do better on creating a corruption AI if I were to do another one in the future or how I could improve this one.

Edit 1/19/2025: Wow! Thank you guys for making this bot the most popular Helen Parr bot on JanitorAI. My first attempt at a corruption bot. Glad you guys like it.
